edus.text: Republican Senate Judiciary Chairman Chuck Grassley has requested
that Attorney General Jeff Sessions and FBI Director Chris Wray open an investigation into attorney Michael Avenatti and his client Julie Swetnick ,
alleging
the pair may have made " materially false statements " to Congress as part of the confirmation process for now-Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh .
" While many of those individuals
[ involved in the Kavanaugh hearing and subsequent investigation ]
have provided the Committee information in good faith ,
it unfortunately appears some have not , "
Grassley wrote In a Thursday letter to the Department of Justice and FBI
written on Thursday .
Grassley then goes on to describe in granular detail a number of alleged " contradictions " in Swetnick ' s claim
that she witnessed Kavanaugh attempting to drug young women for the purpose
of raping them at house parties in the early 1980s .
Swetnick has also stated
that Kavanaugh was present
when she herself was gang raped at one such party .
Grassley also extensively cites a number of unrelated issues with both Avenatti and Swetnick ' s " credibility "
-such as Avenatti ' s allegedly problematic financial dealings and Swetnick ' s alleged behavior with a past boyfriend-as further proof
that the pair should be investigated by the Justice Department .
" When charlatans make false claims to the Committee
- claims
that may earn them short-term media exposure and financial gain ,
but which hinder the Committee ' s ability
to do its job -
there should be consequences , "
Grassley wrote .
" These laws exist
to ensure
there are . "
Grassley ' s extensive attack on both Swetnick and Avenatti stands in sharp contrast to the largely defanged investigation into Kavanaugh himself ,
which conspicuously downplayed and even ignored numerous credible allegations of both sexual misconduct and perjury .
In response to Grassley ' s letter , Avenatti issued a taunting statement
that welcomed the investigation ,
saying :
It is ironic that Sen. Grassley now is interested in investigations .
He didn ' t care
when it came to putting a man on the SCOTUS for life .
We welcome the investigation
as now we can finally get to the bottom of Judge Kavanaugh ' s lies and conduct .
Let the truth be known .
You can read the full Grassley letter here .
The Justice Department has not yet responded to Grassley ' s request .
